raw.message: For those who dream of piloting their own Robot!

hook.summary: Intense mech combat gameplay showing rapid-fire destruction of an enemy unit.
hook.visual_action: A heavily armed robot fires a continuous stream of bullets at a distant target in a desert arena.

scene_flow: First-person perspective gameplay of a heavy robot engaging and destroying an enemy at long range.
The player robot turns to engage a second target, achieving a 'TRIPLE KILL' notification.
Cinematic 3D render of a glowing orange energy core being inserted into a mechanical slot.
Final brand screen with the game logo and a 'PLAY FOR FREE!' call to action.
audience_proxy: Male action gamers 18-35 who enjoy high-intensity vehicular combat and tactical shooters.
